name: Notify
description: Shared notifications queue with batched LLM-formatted delivery and multi-destination routing.

tickIntervalSec.label: Tick interval (seconds)
tickIntervalSec.help: How often the in-gateway flusher wakes up. Default: 1800 (30 min). Lower bound: 10.

destinations.label: Destinations
destinations.help: Named delivery routes. "default" is required. Add others (e.g. "work", "urgent") and route to them with `notify enqueue --destination <name>`.

destinations.default.label: Default destination
destinations.default.help: Where notifications go when no --destination is specified.

destinations.default.channel.label: Channel
destinations.default.channel.help: telegram | discord | slack | signal | imessage. The channel plugin must already be installed.

destinations.default.chatId.label: Chat ID
destinations.default.chatId.help: Channel-specific recipient identifier (Telegram chat id, Slack channel id, etc.).

destinations.default.threadId.label: Thread ID
destinations.default.threadId.help: Optional. Only telegram and slack support threads.

quietHours.label: Quiet hours
quietHours.help: Silence routine notifications during a window. `notify send --force` and per-row urgency override.

llm.label: LLM formatting
llm.help: Batched notifications can be rewritten by an LLM into a single human message. Disabled or unreachable LLMs fall back to a plain template.

llm.provider.label: Provider override
llm.provider.help: Force a specific provider. Leave null to auto-pick whichever provider openclaw has credentials for.

llm.model.label: Model override
llm.model.help: Force a specific model. Leave null to use a cheap default per provider.

personality.label: Personality
personality.help: Optional one-liner voice/style for LLM-formatted notifications (e.g. "Casual but organized.").

dedupWindowMin.label: Dedup window (minutes)
dedupWindowMin.help: Minutes within which identical (source, dedup_key, destination) rows are suppressed.
